title: adina inermis
intro: Adina inermis, also known as the Burma tea or Burmese tea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Adina inermis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
